twofa

  • Index
Search:
Group by:

  • Consts

    • otpauthTotp
  • Procs
        genHotpUri
      • genHotpUri(secret, label: string; issuer: string = ""; counter: uint64; isBase32 = false): AuthURI
        genTotpUri
      • genTotpUri(secret, label: string; issuer: string = ""; interval: uint = 30; isBase32 = false): AuthURI
        getQR
      • getQR(authUri: AuthURI): string
        saveQr
      • saveQr(authUri: AuthURI; path: string)

This module provides functions to generate otpauth URIs for TOTP and HOTP, which can be used to create QR codes for 2FA setup in authenticator apps.

The genTotpUri and genHotpUri procs generate the appropriate otpauth URI format based on the provided secret, label, issuer, and other parameters. The saveQr procedure takes an otpauth URI and saves a QR code representation of it to a specified file.

For more details regarding the QR code generation see pkg/qr documentation, and for OTP generation and verification see pkg/otp documentation.

Types

AuthURI = string
A URI that can be used to generate a QR code for 2FA setup in an authenticator app. 
OtpType = enum
  otpHotp = "hotp", otpTotp = "totp"
The type of OTP to generate. Can be either hotp (counter-based) or totp (time-based)

Consts

otpauthHotp = "otpauth://$1/$2?secret=$3&counter=$4"
The format string for generating an HOTP otpauth URI. It includes placeholders for the OTP type, label, secret, and counter value 
otpauthTotp = "otpauth://$1/$2?secret=$3&period=$4"
The format string for generating a TOTP otpauth URI. It includes placeholders for the OTP type, label, secret, and interval (period)

Procs

proc genHotpUri(secret, label: string; issuer: string = ""; counter: uint64;
                isBase32 = false): AuthURI {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Generates an HOTP otpauth URI for a given secret, label, issuer, and counter value. 
proc genTotpUri(secret, label: string; issuer: string = ""; interval: uint = 30;
                isBase32 = false): AuthURI {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Generates a TOTP otpauth URI for a given secret, label, issuer, and interval. 
proc getQR(authUri: AuthURI): string {.inline, ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
                                       forbids: [].}
Generates a QR code SVG string from the given AuthURI. 
proc saveQr(authUri: AuthURI; path: string) {.inline,
    ...raises: [IOError, ValueError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Generates a QR code from the given AuthURI and saves it to the specified path.
